title: geissorhiza demissa
intro: Geissorhiza demissa is a species of cormous plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the 'Garden of Remembrance' due to its ability to bloom in memory of the fallen soldiers of World War I. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geissorhiza demissa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from pain and itching. Geissorhiza demissa is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
